title: MPIEMSES3D plasma.toml
description: JSON Schema for MPIEMSES3D TOML input. Top-level groups are strict; individual groups allow additional properties so the schema can be extended incrementally.

$schema.description: Optional editor schema hint. Ignored by MPIEMSES3D.

meta.description: Unit conversion metadata (not read by the Fortran solver).

real.description: Physical constants used by the preprocessor (preinp).

realcv.description: Derived conversion values used by the preprocessor (preinp).

system.description: System-wide control flags and boundary conditions.

memo.description: Free-form notes and metadata. Not consumed by the solver. Any key/value pairs are allowed.

species_groups.description:
Named groups of default species parameters. Each `[[species]]` entry can reference a group via `group_id` to inherit its parameters. Entry-level values override group defaults.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `abvdem` | number | Above-damage emission parameter per species. Threshold energy for emission activation. |
| `curb` | number | Backward emission current density per species [simulation units]. |
| `curf` | number | Forward emission current density [simulation units]. |
| `deltaemax` | number | Maximum energy change per species. |
| `denk` | number | Density modulation wave number per species. |
| `denmod` | number | Density modulation amplitude per species. |
| `dnsb` | number | Backward macro-particle division count. |
| `dnsf` | number | Forward macro-particle division count for emission. Larger values create more particles with smaller weight. |
| `emission_end_step` | integer | Time step to stop particle emission per species. -1=no stop (continue until nstep). |
| `emission_leave_anti_particle` | boolean | Leave anti-particle at emission site. |
| `emission_start_step` | integer | Time step to begin particle emission per species. 0=from start. |
| `emission_time_mode` | integer | Emission time variation mode per species. 0=constant, 1=Gaussian temporal profile. |
| `emission_time_sigma` | number | Standard deviation [steps] for Gaussian emission time variation per species. |
| `f` | number | Loss-cone factor (default: 1.0). f=1 with peth=path gives isotropic. 0<f<1 gives loss-cone distribution. |
| `flpb` | number | Backward particle flux at the emission surface per species. |
| `flpf` | number | Forward particle flux at the emission surface per species. Computed from curf: flpf = curf / \|q\|. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a species_groups entry for parameter defaults. Entry-level values override group defaults. |
| `ildig` | integer | Local energy diagnostic flag per species. 0=disabled. |
| `imdig` | integer | Moment diagnostic flag per species. 0=disabled. |
| `injct` | integer | Injection interval [steps]. 0=no periodic injection, >0=inject every injct steps. Legacy spelling for injection_interval. |
| `injection_interval` | integer | Injection interval [steps]. Canonical alias for legacy injct. 0=no periodic injection. |
| `injection_sample_count` | integer | Number of standard-distribution samples for injection particle generation. Canonical alias for legacy npr. |
| `inpb` | integer | Injection flag at upper domain boundary. 0=no injection, 1=inject. Legacy spelling for upper_x_boundary_injection_enabled. |
| `inpf` | integer | Injection flag at lower domain boundary. 0=no injection, 1=inject. Legacy spelling for lower_x_boundary_injection_enabled. |
| `ioptd` | integer | Particle placement optimization flag per species. |
| `ipadig` | integer | Particle diagnostic output interval. 0=no particle output for this species. |
| `ipahdf` | integer | HDF5 particle data skip factor. 0=no HDF5 output for this species. |
| `ipaxyz` | array | Particle data storage flags (7-element array): [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, trace_id]. 1=store, 0=skip. |
| `irhsp` | integer | Charge density output flag per species. |
| `isort` | integer | Particle sort interval. |
| `lcbeta` | number | Loss-cone beta parameter per species. |
| `lcgamma` | number | Loss-cone gamma parameter per species. |
| `lower_x_boundary_injection_enabled` | integer | Injection flag at lower domain boundary. Canonical alias for legacy inpf. 0=no injection, 1=inject. |
| `mfpath` | number | Mean free path per species. |
| `ndst` | integer | Distribution type per species. |
| `nepl` | integer | Number of explicit emission planes per species. |
| `nflag_emit` | integer | Emission type. 0=none, 1=surface emission (curf/curb), 2=space-charge-limited, 3=secondary electron emission. |
| `np` | integer | Maximum particle buffer size. Must be >= npin (auto-expanded if injection is enabled). |
| `npbnd` | array | Particle boundary condition per axis (3-element array): [x, y, z]. 0=periodic, 1=reflective, 2=free, -1=follow nfbnd. Legacy spelling for particle_boundary_mode. |
| `nphi` | integer | Number of azimuthal bins for velocity distribution diagnostics. |
| `npin` | integer | Initial macro-particle count at t=0. Set <0 to start with zero particles (beam injection only). |
| `npr` | integer | Number of standard-distribution samples for injection particle generation per species. Legacy spelling for injection_sample_count. |
| `omegalw` | number | Lower-hybrid frequency per species. |
| `particle_boundary_mode` | array | Particle boundary condition per axis (3-element array). Canonical alias for legacy npbnd. |
| `particle_hdf5_stride` | integer | HDF5 particle data skip factor. Canonical alias for legacy ipahdf. 0=no HDF5 output for this species. |
| `particle_output_flags` | array | Particle data storage flags (7-element array). Canonical alias for legacy ipaxyz: [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, trace_id]. 1=store, 0=skip. |
| `particle_output_interval` | integer | Particle diagnostic output interval. Canonical alias for legacy ipadig. 0=no particle output for this species. |
| `path` | number | Parallel thermal velocity. Distribution: f ~ exp(-(v-spa)^2 / (2*path^2)). |
| `pemax` | number | Maximum photoemission energy per species. |
| `peth` | number | Perpendicular thermal velocity / sqrt(2). Actual v_perp = sqrt(2) * peth. |
| `qm` | number | Charge-to-mass ratio for this species (negative for electrons). |
| `qp` | number | Macro-particle charge for forward emission per species. |
| `qpr` | number | Macro-particle charge for backward emission per species. |
| `ray_azimuth_angle_deg` | number | Solar azimuth angle [deg] per species for photoelectron ray-casting emission direction. |
| `ray_zenith_angle_deg` | number | Solar zenith angle [deg] per species for photoelectron ray-casting emission direction. |
| `spa` | number | Parallel drift velocity in the distribution function (default: 0.0). |
| `spe` | number | Perpendicular drift velocity per species (default: 0.0). |
| `speth` | number | Direction angle of perpendicular drift [deg] (default: 0.0). |
| `upper_x_boundary_injection_enabled` | integer | Injection flag at upper domain boundary. Canonical alias for legacy inpb. 0=no injection, 1=inject. |
| `vdri` | number | Drift velocity magnitude [simulation units]. Direction set by vdthz and vdthxy. |
| `vdthxy` | number | Drift velocity azimuthal angle [deg] in the x-y plane. |
| `vdthz` | number | Drift velocity polar angle [deg] from z-axis. |
| `vdx` | number | Drift velocity x-component per species (Cartesian alternative to vdri/vdthz/vdthxy). |
| `vdy` | number | Drift velocity y-component per species. |
| `vdz` | number | Drift velocity z-component per species. |
| `vpa` | number | Minimum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: -16.0). |
| `vpb` | number | Maximum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: 16.0). |
| `vpe` | number | Maximum of perpendicular velocity distribution range (default: 32.0). |
| `wp` | number | Plasma frequency for this species [simulation units]. |

digcon_group.description: Diagnostic output frequency, range, and format for HDF5 dumps, field maps, and current density.

i1hdf.description: HDF5 output spatial stride in axis 1. -1=no output, 1=every cell.

i2hdf.description: HDF5 output spatial stride in axis 2. -1=no output, 1=every cell.

i3hdf.description: HDF5 output spatial stride in axis 3. -1=no output, 1=every cell.

hdfdigstart.description: Time step to start HDF5 diagnostic output. 0=from beginning.

hdfdigend.description: Time step to stop HDF5 diagnostic output. -2=until end.

field_output_interval.description: Field diagnostic output interval. Canonical alias for legacy ifdiag. 0=no output.

current_output_interval.description: Current diagnostic output interval. Canonical alias for legacy ijdiag. 0=no output.

hdf_output_size_limit_gb.description: Estimated HDF5 diagnostic output size limit [GB]. Default 100.0. Input loading aborts when estimated field/current/particle HDF5 output exceeds this value. Set <=0 to disable the guard.

intfoc.description: Number of main loop repetitions between diagnostic outputs. Should be an integer multiple of field_substeps_per_particle_step (legacy mltstp).

diagnostic_interval.description: Number of main loop repetitions between text diagnostic outputs. Canonical alias for legacy intfoc.

itchck.description: Number of main loop repetitions between CPU time checks (see maxt).

walltime_check_interval.description: Number of main loop repetitions between wall-clock time checks. Canonical alias for legacy itchck.

daverg.description: Time-averaging factor for field diagnostics. 0=instantaneous, >0=averaged over daverg steps.

field_average_window.description: Time-averaging factor for field diagnostics. Canonical alias for legacy daverg. 0=instantaneous.

ipahdf.description: HDF5 particle data skip factor per species. 0=no output.

particle_hdf5_stride.description: HDF5 particle data skip factor per species. Canonical alias for legacy ipahdf. 0=no output.

ipadig.description: Particle diagnostic output interval per species. 0=no output.

particle_output_interval.description: Particle diagnostic output interval per species. Canonical alias for legacy ipadig. 0=no output.

ipaxyz.description: Particle data storage flags (7-element array per species). Elements: [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, trace_id].

particle_output_flags.description: Particle data storage flags (7-element array per species). Canonical alias for legacy ipaxyz. Elements: [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, trace_id].

ifxyz.description: Field output flags (7-element array). [Ex, Ey, Ez, Bx, By, Bz, rho/phi scalar outputs]. 1=output, 0=skip.

field_output_flags.description: Field output flags (7-element array). Canonical alias for legacy ifxyz. [Ex, Ey, Ez, Bx, By, Bz, rho/phi scalar outputs]. 1=output, 0=skip.

ijxyz.description: Current output flags (4-element array). [Jx, Jy, Jz, JS]. 1=output, 0=skip.

current_output_flags.description: Current output flags (4-element array). Canonical alias for legacy ijxyz. [Jx, Jy, Jz, JS]. 1=output, 0=skip.

iTxyz.description: Kinetic temperature output flags (7-element array, per species). [T_iso, T_xx, T_yy, T_zz, T_xy, T_xz, T_yz]. 1=output, 0=skip. Default [1,0,0,0,0,0,0] = isotropic scalar only. Internal storage is minimized based on flags: L1 (scalar) < L2 (diagonal) < L3 (full tensor).

kinetic_temperature_output_flags.description: Kinetic temperature output flags (7-element array, per species). Canonical alias for legacy iTxyz. [T_iso, T_xx, T_yy, T_zz, T_xy, T_xz, T_yz]. 1=output, 0=skip.

nvx.description: Number of velocity-space bins in x for distribution function diagnostics.

nvy.description: Number of velocity-space bins in y for distribution function diagnostics.

nvz.description: Number of velocity-space bins in z for distribution function diagnostics.

ikxmax.description: Maximum wave number in x for k-spectrum analysis.

ikymax.description: Maximum wave number in y for k-spectrum analysis.

ikzmax.description: Maximum wave number in z for k-spectrum analysis.

emarlxt.description: External margin step count for energy analysis timing.

ildig.description: Local energy diagnostic flag per species. 0=disabled.

isort.description: Particle sort interval per species [steps]. Default: 500.

irhsp.description: Charge density output flag per species. Default: 1.

dipole_group.description: Embedded magnetic dipole sources for localized magnetic fields.

source_groups.description:
Named groups of default magnetic-dipole parameters. Each `[[dipole.sources]]` entry can reference a group via `group_id`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a source_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `md` | number | Magnetic dipole moment magnitude. |
| `mddir` | integer | Dipole moment direction. 0=x-axis, 1=y-axis, 2=z-axis. |
| `mdx` | number | Dipole x-position in grid units. |
| `mdy` | number | Dipole y-position in grid units. |
| `mdz` | number | Dipole z-position in grid units. |

sources.description:
Magnetic dipole sources (format_version = 2). Each `[[dipole.sources]]` entry defines one dipole.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a source_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `md` | number | Magnetic dipole moment magnitude. |
| `mddir` | integer | Dipole moment direction. 0=x-axis, 1=y-axis, 2=z-axis. |
| `mdx` | number | Dipole x-position in grid units. |
| `mdy` | number | Dipole y-position in grid units. |
| `mdz` | number | Dipole z-position in grid units. |

nmd.description: Number of magnetic dipoles (maximum 10). Auto-computed from [[dipole.sources]] count in format_version=2.

mode_dipole.description: Dipole/gap-drive mode selector. 0=disabled (default), 1=legacy gap-feed setup, 2=current-source gap drive, 3=lumped-element (resc/capc) gap drive.

ngap.description: Number of antenna gap feed points (default: 0, max 4).

w_c.description: Center frequency for pulsed excitation at the gap. Negative=monochromatic.

gap_amp.description: Gap field amplitude per gap feed point.

i_gap.description: X grid index of each gap feed point.

j_gap.description: Y grid index of each gap feed point.

k_gap.description: Z grid index of each gap feed point.

resc.description: Resistance at each gap feed point (default: -1.0). Negative=no resistive loading.

capc.description: Capacitance at each gap feed point (default: 0.0).

group_id.description: Reference to a source_groups entry for parameter defaults.

allOf.description:
Magnetic dipole. Each `[[dipole.sources]]` entry defines one dipole.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a source_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `md` | number | Magnetic dipole moment magnitude. |
| `mddir` | integer | Dipole moment direction. 0=x-axis, 1=y-axis, 2=z-axis. |
| `mdx` | number | Dipole x-position in grid units. |
| `mdy` | number | Dipole y-position in grid units. |
| `mdz` | number | Dipole z-position in grid units. |

emissn_group.description: Charged particle emission from internal or external surfaces (e.g. photoelectrons, secondary electrons).

decrease_current_according_to_incident_a.description: Scale emission current by cos(incident angle) for non-normal solar illumination (default: true).

nflag_emit.description: Emission type per species. 0=none, 1=surface emission (curf/curb), 2=space-charge-limited emission, 3=secondary electron emission (SEE).

nepl.description: Number of explicit emission planes per species.

flpf.description: Forward particle flux at the emission surface per species. Computed from curf: flpf = curf / |q|.

flpb.description: Backward particle flux at the emission surface per species.

curf.description: Forward emission current density per species [simulation units].

curb.description: Backward emission current density per species [simulation units].

qp.description: Macro-particle charge for forward emission per species.

qpr.description: Macro-particle charge for backward emission per species.

abvdem.description: Above-damage emission parameter per species. Threshold energy for emission activation.

dnsf.description: Forward macro-particle division count per species for emission. Higher values = more particles with smaller weight.

dnsb.description: Backward macro-particle division count per species for emission.

imarea.description: Emission area mask per conductor. Associates emission with a specific conductor for charge conservation.

ipcpl.description: Conductor ID coupled to emission plane for charge conservation. Each value must be in 1..npc.

nemd.description: Emission normal direction per emission plane. +/-1=x, +/-2=y, +/-3=z (sign = forward/backward).

omniemit.description: Omni-directional emission flag per emission plane. 0=directional, 1=omni-directional (half-Maxwellian).

remf.description: Forward emission region extent per species.

remb.description: Backward emission region extent per species.

xmaxe.description: Emission region x-upper bound per emission plane [grid units].

xmine.description: Emission region x-lower bound per emission plane [grid units].

ymaxe.description: Emission region y-upper bound per emission plane [grid units].

ymine.description: Emission region y-lower bound per emission plane [grid units].

zmaxe.description: Emission region z-upper bound per emission plane [grid units].

zmine.description: Emission region z-lower bound per emission plane [grid units].

thetaz.description: Emission elevation angle [deg] from the surface normal. Used with thetaxy for directed emission.

thetaxy.description: Emission azimuthal angle [deg] in the x-y plane. Used with thetaz for directed emission.

plreloc.description: Plasma relocation parameter for emission near conductors (default: 0.0).

mainprop.description: Main propagation cosine factor for emission direction (default: 1.0 = normal to surface).

pe_ray_cast.description: Enable photoelectron ray-casting to determine shadowed regions on the emission surface (default: false).

ray_zenith_angle_deg.description: Solar zenith angle [deg] per species for photoelectron ray-casting emission direction.

ray_azimuth_angle_deg.description: Solar azimuth angle [deg] per species for photoelectron ray-casting emission direction.

periodic_raycast.description: Enable periodic boundary-aware ray-casting for photoelectron emission (default: false). plane-with-circle[x/y/z] boundaries are treated as infinite planes and are not duplicated.

max_periodic_shift.description: Maximum periodic image shift count for periodic ray-casting (default: 10).

max_boundary_height.description: Maximum boundary height [grid units] considered in ray-casting (default: 30).

emission_time_mode.description: Emission time variation mode per species. 0=constant, 1=Gaussian temporal profile.

emission_start_step.description: Time step to begin particle emission per species. 0=from start.

emission_end_step.description: Time step to stop particle emission per species. -1=no stop (continue until nstep).

emission_time_sigma.description: Standard deviation [steps] for Gaussian emission time variation per species.

emission_leave_anti_particle.description: Leave an anti-particle at the emission site per species to maintain local charge neutrality (default: true).

plane_groups.description:
Named groups of default emission-plane parameters. Each `[[emissn.planes]]` entry can reference a group via `group_id`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `curbs` | number | Backward emission current density for this plane [simulation units]. |
| `curfs` | number | Forward emission current density for this plane [simulation units]. |
| `dnsbs` | number | Backward macro-particle division count for this plane. |
| `dnsfs` | number | Forward macro-particle division count for this plane. |
| `flpbs` | number | Backward particle flux for this emission plane. |
| `flpfs` | number | Forward particle flux for this emission plane. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a plane_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `ipcpl` | integer | Conductor ID coupled to this emission plane for charge conservation. |
| `nemd` | integer | Emission normal direction. +/-1=x, +/-2=y, +/-3=z (sign = forward/backward). |
| `omniemit` | integer | Omni-directional emission flag for this plane. 0=directional, 1=omni-directional (half-Maxwellian). |
| `remb` | number | Backward emission region extent for this plane. |
| `remf` | number | Forward emission region extent for this plane. |
| `xmaxe` | number | Emission plane x-upper bound [grid units]. |
| `xmine` | number | Emission plane x-lower bound [grid units]. |
| `ymaxe` | number | Emission plane y-upper bound [grid units]. |
| `ymine` | number | Emission plane y-lower bound [grid units]. |
| `zmaxe` | number | Emission plane z-upper bound [grid units]. |
| `zmine` | number | Emission plane z-lower bound [grid units]. |

planes.description:
Explicit emission planes (format_version = 2). Each `[[emissn.planes]]` entry defines one emission plane.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `curbs` | number | Backward emission current density for this plane [simulation units]. |
| `curfs` | number | Forward emission current density for this plane [simulation units]. |
| `dnsbs` | number | Backward macro-particle division count for this plane. |
| `dnsfs` | number | Forward macro-particle division count for this plane. |
| `flpbs` | number | Backward particle flux for this emission plane. |
| `flpfs` | number | Forward particle flux for this emission plane. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a plane_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `ipcpl` | integer | Conductor ID coupled to this emission plane for charge conservation. |
| `nemd` | integer | Emission normal direction. +/-1=x, +/-2=y, +/-3=z (sign = forward/backward). |
| `omniemit` | integer | Omni-directional emission flag for this plane. 0=directional, 1=omni-directional (half-Maxwellian). |
| `remb` | number | Backward emission region extent for this plane. |
| `remf` | number | Forward emission region extent for this plane. |
| `xmaxe` | number | Emission plane x-upper bound [grid units]. |
| `xmine` | number | Emission plane x-lower bound [grid units]. |
| `ymaxe` | number | Emission plane y-upper bound [grid units]. |

emflag.description: Field solver mode. 0 = Electrostatic (Poisson) — no magnetic field evolution, CFL violations are warnings only. 1 = Full electromagnetic (Maxwell) — CFL condition strictly enforced. 2 = legacy implicit EM (`imses`) path. 3 = implicit electrostatic (`isses`) path using IMSES moments/mover, rhohat Poisson, and a local chi mass inverse. CoToCoA requester/worker builds replace the emflag=0 electrostatic path and are not selected by emflag=2 or emflag=3.

nflag_testp.description: Test particle flag. 0=normal simulation, 1=test particle mode.

gradema_group.description: Surface charging acceleration (EMA-based gradient method) for faster convergence of surface potential.

coef_start.description: Time-fraction thresholds (relative to nstep) selecting which grad_coef/smooth_coef segment to use.

smooth_coef.description: EMA smoothing coefficient: EMA(t) = (1 - smooth_coef)*EMA(t-1) + smooth_coef*drhobk(t).

grad_coef.description: Charging acceleration coefficient: rhobk(t) = rhobk(t-1) + grad_coef * EMA(t). Default: 1.0.

grad_coef2.description: Secondary gradient coefficient for 'linear' and 'bezier' grad_type modes.

grad_type.description: Gradient mode for spatial variation of charging acceleration.

control_grad_coef.description: Control points for spatially-varying gradient coefficient.

inp_group.description: Particle injection from simulation domain boundaries.

inpf.description: Injection flag at lower x-boundary per species. 0=no injection, 1=inject. Legacy spelling for lower_x_boundary_injection_enabled.

inpb.description: Injection flag at upper x-boundary per species. 0=no injection, 1=inject. Legacy spelling for upper_x_boundary_injection_enabled.

injct.description: Time step interval between continuous injections per species. 0=disable periodic injection. Legacy spelling for injection_interval.

npr.description: Number of standard-distribution samples for injection particle generation. Legacy spelling for injection_sample_count.

lower_x_boundary_injection_enabled.description: Injection flag at lower x-boundary per species. Canonical alias for legacy inpf. 0=no injection, 1=inject.

upper_x_boundary_injection_enabled.description: Injection flag at upper x-boundary per species. Canonical alias for legacy inpb. 0=no injection, 1=inject.

injection_interval.description: Time step interval between continuous injections per species. Canonical alias for legacy injct. 0=disable periodic injection.

injection_sample_count.description: Number of standard-distribution samples for injection particle generation. Canonical alias for legacy npr.

intp_group.description: Particle species attributes, initial placement, and integration parameters in normalized EMSES units.

np.description: Particle buffer size per species. Increase if buffer overflow occurs during emission/injection.

npin.description: Initial macro-particle count per species at startup. Mutually exclusive with [emissn].dnsf.

path.description: Parallel thermal velocity per species (parallel to B0).

spa.description: Parallel drift velocity in the distribution function (default: 0.0).

peth.description: Perpendicular thermal velocity per species (perpendicular to B0).

f.description: Loss-cone factor (default: 1.0). f=1 with peth=path gives isotropic. 0<f<1 gives loss-cone distribution.

vdx.description: Drift velocity x-component per species (Cartesian alternative to vdri/vdthz/vdthxy).

vpa.description: Minimum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: -16.0).

vpb.description: Maximum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: 16.0).

vpe.description: Maximum of perpendicular velocity distribution range (default: 32.0).

nphi.description: Number of azimuthal bins for velocity distribution diagnostics.

ioptd.description: Particle placement optimization flag per species.

vdri.description: Bulk drift velocity magnitude per species.

vdthz.description: Drift direction zenith angle [deg] per species (0° = +z).

vdthxy.description: Drift direction azimuthal angle [deg] per species (from +x, CCW).

jobcon_group.description: Job execution control: restart, snapshot, and step count.

jobnum.description: Job control flags [restart_mode, snapshot_mode]. restart_mode: 0=new run, >0=continue from SNAPSHOT0.

nstep.description: Total number of time steps to simulate.

lstep.description: Last completed step (used internally for restart; overrides nstep if >0).

random_seed.description: Random number generator seed. Omit or use -9999 to choose the simulator default; any other integer is passed to the RNG setup for deterministic initialization.

| `wjs` | number | Current source oscillation frequency [simulation units]. |

group_id.description: Reference to a source_groups entry for parameter defaults.

rjs.description: Current source grid indices [x, y, z].

ajs.description: Current source amplitude [Jx, Jy, Jz] in simulation units.

allOf.description:
Current source. Each `[[jsrc.sources]]` entry defines one source.

meta_group.description: Unit conversion metadata. Not consumed by the solver; preserved for post-processing and visualization.

unit_conversion.description: Normalization keys that map simulation units to physical units.

dx.description: Grid spacing in physical units [m]. Corresponds to !!key dx=[…] in plasma.inp.

to_c.description: Ratio of physical light speed to normalized light speed (cv): to_c = c_phys / cv.

format_version.description: Input format version. 1 (or absent) = legacy flat-array only. 2 = new-style [[species]], [[ptcond.boundaries]], [[ptcond.objects]] supported.

physical.description: Physical (SI-unit) plasma conditions. Used by `emu apply` to compute simulation-unit parameters. Not consumed by the solver.

density_m3.description: Default plasma number density [m^-3]. Can be overridden per species. -> species.wp (via plasma frequency)

magnetic_field_T.description: Background magnetic field magnitude [T]. Sign indicates direction. -> plasma.wc

magnetic_field_phiz_deg.description: Magnetic field polar angle from z-axis [deg]. -> plasma.phiz

magnetic_field_phixy_deg.description: Magnetic field azimuthal angle in x-y plane [deg]. -> plasma.phixy

particles_per_cell.description: Default macro-particles per grid cell for all species. -> species.npin

species_groups.description:
Named groups of default species physical parameters. Each `[[meta.physical.species]]` entry can reference a group via `group_id`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `density_m3` | number | Number density [m^-3] for this species. Overrides global meta.physical.density_m3. -> species.wp |
| `drift_velocity_m_s` | number | Bulk drift velocity [m/s]. Sign indicates direction. -> species.vdri |
| `emission_current_density_A_m2` | number | Emission current density [A/m^2]. -> species.curf, species.nflag_emit=2, species.npin=0 |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a species_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `label` | string | Human-readable label (e.g. 'electron', 'ion', 'photoelectron'). Documentation only. |
| `mass_ratio` | number | Mass ratio relative to electron mass (electron=1, proton=1836.15). -> species.qm |
| `particles_per_cell` | integer | Particles per grid cell. Overrides global value. -> species.npin |
| `path_temperature_eV` | number | Parallel (to B) temperature [eV]. Overrides temperature_eV. -> species.path |
| `peth_temperature_eV` | number | Perpendicular (to B) temperature [eV]. Overrides temperature_eV. -> species.peth |
| `qm_sign` | number | Sign of charge-to-mass ratio (-1 for electrons, +1 for ions). -> species.qm |
| `temperature_eV` | number | Isotropic temperature [eV]. -> species.path, species.peth |

meta_physical_species_base.description: Physical parameters for one particle species in SI units. Index corresponds to [[species]] index.

group_id.description: Reference to a species_groups entry for parameter defaults.

density_m3.description: Number density [m^-3] for this species. Overrides global meta.physical.density_m3. -> species.wp

mass_ratio.description: Mass ratio relative to electron mass (electron=1, proton=1836.15). -> species.qm

qm_sign.description: Sign of charge-to-mass ratio (-1 for electrons, +1 for ions). -> species.qm

path_temperature_eV.description: Parallel (to B) temperature [eV]. Overrides temperature_eV. -> species.path

peth_temperature_eV.description: Perpendicular (to B) temperature [eV]. Overrides temperature_eV. -> species.peth

drift_velocity_m_s.description: Bulk drift velocity [m/s]. Sign indicates direction. -> species.vdri

particles_per_cell.description: Particles per grid cell. Overrides global value. -> species.npin

emission_current_density_A_m2.description: Emission current density [A/m^2]. -> species.curf, species.nflag_emit=2, species.npin=0

meta_physical_conductor_base.description: Physical parameters for one conductor group in SI units.

group_id.description: Reference to a conductor_groups entry for parameter defaults.

meta_physical_object_base.description: Physical parameters for one conductor object in SI units.

group_id.description: Reference to an object_groups entry for parameter defaults.

nodes.description: Number of MPI process divisions along [x, y, z]. Total processes = nodes[0] * nodes[1] * nodes[2], and must match the runtime MPI communicator size.

tcs.description: Temperature ratio parameter for sound speed calculation (Te/Ti).

cs.description: Ion acoustic speed (sound speed) in simulation units.

plasma_group.description: Fundamental plasma and field parameters in normalized EMSES units.

wp.description: Plasma frequency per species. Indirectly sets plasma density: wp_s = sqrt(n_s q_s^2 / (eps0 m_s)).

wc.description: Electron cyclotron frequency. Sets background magnetic field strength: wc = e B0 / m_e.

cv.description: Normalized speed of light c/v_ref. Controls CFL condition and numerical dispersion.

gfactor.description: Implicit solver factor (default: 0.5). Controls weighting between old/new time levels; used as iPIC3D theta in IMSES/ISSES.

phixy.description: Azimuthal angle [deg] of the static magnetic field projected onto the x-y plane.

phiz.description: Elevation angle [deg] of the static magnetic field from the z-axis.

rho0.description: Reference charge density (default: -1.0 = auto). Positive value overrides the neutralizing background.

denk.description: Density modulation wave number per species.

ptcond_group.description: Surface, conductor, and inner boundary settings: geometry, potential, subcell, and secondary electron emission.

boundary_type.description: Overall boundary surface type. Selects the boundary geometry model applied to the simulation domain.

boundary_types.description: Sub-boundary type list for complex mode. Each element defines the shape of one sub-boundary element.

zssurf.description: Z-coordinate of the ground surface [grid units] (for *-surface and *-hole types).

zsbuf.description: Buffer zone above zssurf where particles are not initially placed.

rcurv.description: Curvature ratio: minimum-to-maximum radius (for hyperboloid-hole, ellipsoid-hole, dent-rectangle-hole).

xlrechole.description: X lower boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

xurechole.description: X upper boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

ylrechole.description: Y lower boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

yurechole.description: Y upper boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

zlrechole.description: Z lower boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

zurechole.description: Z upper boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

rectangle_shape.description: Axis-aligned rectangular plane extents: [xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax] per sub-boundary. One axis pair should be degenerate.

circle_origin.description: Circle center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

cuboid_shape.description: Cuboid extents: [xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax] per sub-boundary.

sphere_origin.description: Sphere center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

cylinder_origin.description: Cylinder bottom-center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

cylinder_height.description: Cylinder height along its axis per sub-boundary.

disk_origin.description: Annular disk bottom-center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

disk_radius.description: Annular disk outer radius per sub-boundary.

disk_inner_radius.description: Annular disk inner radius per sub-boundary.

npc.description: Number of solid conductor objects defined in the simulation.

npcg.description: Number of conductor groups. Objects in the same group share electrical properties.

pcgs.description: Number of objects in each conductor group. Initialization converts these counts into runtime prefix offsets; length is npcg.

ccgs.description: Number of objects in each charge-coupling group. Defaults to pcgs when omitted; length is npcg.

mtd_vchg.description: Potential treatment method per conductor group. 0=floating, abs(mtd_vchg)=1=fixed potential. The +1/-1 sign is preserved for legacy input compatibility.

capacity_matrix_mode.description: Capacity matrix computation method. 1: no capacitance matrix (surface_charge skipped), 2: build capacitance matrix from scratch, 3: read precomputed capacitance matrix from capacity_matrix.h5, 4: distributed build with root-rank inversion followed by distributed reload, 5: distributed build with distributed LU/solve backend. Auto-derived from abs(modeww) when unset.

charge_accumulation.description: Whether to include charge accumulation on conductor surfaces. 1: considered, 0: not considered. Auto-derived from sign of modeww when unset.

modeww.description: Deprecated. Capacity matrix mode retained for backward compatibility. abs(modeww) maps to capacity_matrix_mode; modeww<0 maps to charge_accumulation=1; modeww>0 maps to charge_accumulation=0. When capacity_matrix_mode and charge_accumulation are explicitly set, they take precedence.

conductivity.description: Surface conductivity for the boundary material [simulation units]. This is a flat scalar, not a per-boundary [[ptcond.boundaries]] entry parameter.

boundary_conductor_id.description: Conductor ID (ipc) associated with each sub-boundary for charge accounting.

max_bounce_count.description: Maximum number of surface bounces before absorption.

collision_accelerator_min_boundaries.description: Minimum resolved boundary count required to enable the particle-boundary collision accelerator AABB broad-phase filter and cell index. Below the threshold, the legacy direct boundary scan is used. 0 or 1 enables the accelerator for any nonzero boundary count. Default is 30.

enable_secondary_electron_emission.description: Enable secondary electron emission (SEE) per boundary and species.

boundary_se_model_type.description: SEE yield model type. 0=Whipple (1981) empirical model (energy and angle dependent), 1=constant yield.

boundary_se_const_yield.description: Constant SEE yield (used when const-yield model is selected).

boundary_se_yield_max.description: Maximum SEE yield delta_max at optimal energy.

boundary_se_energy_max.description: Incident energy E_max [EMSES eV] at which yield = delta_max.

boundary_se_species_id.description: Species ID for emitted secondary electrons (default: 1 = electron).

boundary_mirror_reflection_rate.description: Specular (mirror) reflection probability per boundary and species (0.0-1.0).

boundary_reversal_reflection_rate.description: Reversal (backscatter) reflection probability per boundary and species (0.0-1.0).

boundary_mirror_reflect_alpha.description: Beckmann roughness parameter alpha for specular reflection per boundary and species.

boundary_reversal_reflect_alpha.description: Beckmann roughness parameter alpha for reversal reflection per boundary and species.

boundary_mirror_reflect_energy_loss_frac.description: Kinetic energy loss fraction on specular reflection per boundary and species (0.0-1.0).

boundary_reversal_reflect_energy_loss_fr.description: Kinetic energy loss fraction on reversal reflection per boundary and species (0.0-1.0).

boundary_groups.description:
Named groups of default boundary parameters. Each `[[ptcond.boundaries]]` entry can reference a group via `group_id`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `boundary_conductor_id` | integer | Conductor ID (ipc) for charge accounting. Links this boundary to a conductor group. |
| `boundary_mirror_reflect_alpha` | array | Beckmann roughness parameter alpha for specular reflection per species (regolith ~0.3–0.5). |
| `boundary_mirror_reflect_energy_loss_frac` | array | Kinetic energy loss fraction on specular reflection per species (v' = sqrt(1-frac)*v). |
| `boundary_mirror_reflection_rate` | array | Specular (mirror) reflection probability per species (0.0–1.0). |
| `boundary_reversal_reflect_alpha` | array | Beckmann roughness parameter alpha for reversal reflection per species. |
| `boundary_reversal_reflect_energy_loss_frac` | array | Kinetic energy loss fraction on reversal reflection per species. |
| `boundary_reversal_reflection_rate` | array | Reversal (backscatter) reflection probability per species (0.0–1.0). |
| `boundary_se_const_yield` | array | Constant SEE yield value per species (used when model_type=1). |
| `boundary_se_energy_max` | array | Incident energy E_max [EMSES eV] at which SEE yield reaches delta_max, per species. |
| `boundary_se_model_type` | array | SEE yield model type per species. 0=Whipple/Vaughan-like, 1=constant yield. |
| `boundary_se_species_id` | array | Species ID of emitted secondary electrons per species (default: 1). |
| `boundary_se_yield_max` | array | Maximum secondary electron emission (SEE) yield delta_max per species. |
| `circle_origin` | array | Circle center coordinates [x, y, z] in grid units. |
| `circle_radius` | number | Circle radius in grid units. |
| `conductor_object` | string | ID of a [[ptcond.objects]] entry used for charge accounting. Resolved to boundary_conductor_id while reading the input. |
| `cuboid_shape` | array | Cuboid bounds [xl, xu, yl, yu, zl, zu] in grid units. |
| `cylinder_height` | number | Cylinder height in grid units along the alignment axis. |
| `cylinder_origin` | array | Cylinder bottom-center coordinates [x, y, z] in grid units. |
| `cylinder_radius` | number | Cylinder radius in grid units. |
| `disk_height` | number | Disk thickness in grid units along the alignment axis. |
| `disk_inner_radius` | number | Disk inner radius for annular disk in grid units (0 for solid disk). |
| `disk_origin` | array | Disk bottom-center coordinates [x, y, z] in grid units. |
| `disk_radius` | number | Disk outer radius in grid units. |
| `enable_secondary_electron_emission` | array | Enable secondary electron emission (SEE) for this boundary per species. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a boundary_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `rcurv` | number | Curvature ratio for dent/hyperboloid/ellipsoid hole surfaces. Surface entry shorthand for the global legacy &ptcond parameter; all structured entries must agree. |
| `xlrechole` | array | X lower bounds of the rectangular hole [grid units], 1 or 2 values. A one-value array is expanded to [value, value]. Surface entry shorthand for the global legacy &ptcond parameter. |
| `xurechole` | array | X upper bounds of the rectangular hole [grid units], 1 or 2 values. A one-value array is expanded to [value, value]. Surface entry shorthand for the global legacy &ptcond parameter. |
| `ylrechole` | array | Y lower bounds of the rectangular hole [grid units], 1 or 2 values. A one-value array is expanded to [value, value]. Surface entry shorthand for the global legacy &ptcond parameter. |
| `yurechole` | array | Y upper bounds of the rectangular hole [grid units], 1 or 2 values. A one-value array is expanded to [value, value]. Surface entry shorthand for the global legacy &ptcond parameter. |

object_groups.description:

| `wirehlength` | number | Wire half-length along the alignment axis in grid units. |

| `ylpc` | number | Cuboid y-lower bound in grid units (geotype=0 or 1). |
| `yupc` | number | Cuboid y-upper bound in grid units (geotype=0 or 1). |
| `zlpc` | number | Cuboid z-lower bound in grid units (geotype=0 or 1). |
| `zupc` | number | Cuboid z-upper bound in grid units (geotype=0 or 1). |

real_group.description: Physical constants for the preprocessor (preinp). Values here are not read by the solver directly.

deltax.description: Grid spacing [m] for unit conversion by the preprocessor.

deltat.description: Time step [s] for unit conversion by the preprocessor.

density.description: Reference plasma number density [m^-3] for normalization.

etemp.description: Electron temperature [eV] for thermal velocity calculation.

itemp.description: Ion temperature [eV] for thermal velocity calculation.

realcv_group.description: Derived conversion values for the preprocessor.

cvsim.description: Normalized light speed used in the simulation.

system_group.description: System-wide control flags: species count, boundary conditions, and field masking.

mltstp.description: Multiple time step ratio: number of field update sub-steps per particle push step (default: 1). Legacy spelling for field_substeps_per_particle_step.

mltstpf.description: Field sub-step factor for the implicit solver (default: 1). Used with mltstp for EM mode. Legacy spelling for implicit_field_substep_factor.

juncan.description: Uniform current cancellation. 0=off, 1=subtract uniform current, 2=also skip ES component, -2=skip ES only. >=1000 = test particle mode (wave field given externally). Legacy spelling for current_cancellation_mode.

ionchg.description: Background ion charge option. 0=uniform neutralization across system, 1=local neutralization at each grid point. Legacy spelling for background_ion_charge_mode.

jxfltr.description: Current-filter option for Jx. -1=no filtering; bit flags 1/2/4 select filtering along x/y/z.

jyfltr.description: Current-filter option for Jy. -1=no filtering; bit flags 1/2/4 select filtering along x/y/z.

jzfltr.description: Current-filter option for Jz. -1=no filtering; bit flags 1/2/4 select filtering along x/y/z.

ipexfl.description: Particle-pushing field filter option for pex. Uses the same bit flags as jxfltr.

ipeyfl.description: Particle-pushing field filter option for pey. Uses the same bit flags as jyfltr.

ipezfl.description: Particle-pushing field filter option for pez. Uses the same bit flags as jzfltr.

nfltrx.description: Electrostatic Ex Fourier filter cutoff. If >0, modes above this wave number are filtered.

nfltry.description: Electrostatic Ey Fourier filter cutoff. If >0, modes above this wave number are filtered.

nfltrz.description: Electrostatic Ez Fourier filter cutoff. If >0, modes above this wave number are filtered.

nfbnd.description: Field boundary condition per axis [x,y,z]. 0=periodic, 1=free (absorbing), 2=damping (wave-absorbing layer). Legacy spelling for field_boundary_mode.

npbnd.description: Particle boundary condition per axis per species (3 x nspec). 0=periodic, 1=reflective, 2=free (escape/inject), -1=follow field_boundary_mode (legacy nfbnd). Legacy spelling for particle_boundary_mode.

mtd_vbnd.description: Potential boundary method per axis [x,y,z]. 0=periodic, 1=Dirichlet (fixed), 2=Neumann (zero gradient), 3=open/free-space (doubles FFT grid). Legacy spelling for potential_boundary_mode.

boundary_conditions.description: Boundary condition values as [lower, upper] per axis (2x3 array). Interpretation depends on field_boundary_mode (legacy nfbnd) and potential_boundary_mode (legacy mtd_vbnd) settings.

iphiref.description: Reference point indices for potential solver (2x3 array: [lower,upper] per axis). Legacy spelling for potential_reference_indices.

imask.description: Field component mask (7-element array). Selects which components to zero: [B-field, E-trans, E-long, current, charge, unused, unused]. 0=keep, 1=mask. Legacy spelling for field_mask_flags.

separate_accumulated_and_space_charge.description: Separate accumulated surface charge from space charge in the Poisson solver (default: true).

nxl.description: Left damping region width in x [grid cells]. Used when field_boundary_mode=2 (legacy nfbnd=2). Default: 2.

nxr.description: Right damping region width in x [grid cells]. Used when field_boundary_mode=2 (legacy nfbnd=2). Default: 2.

nyl.description: Left damping region width in y [grid cells]. Used when field_boundary_mode=2 (legacy nfbnd=2). Default: 2.

nyr.description: Right damping region width in y [grid cells]. Used when field_boundary_mode=2 (legacy nfbnd=2). Default: 2.

nzl.description: Left damping region width in z [grid cells]. Used when field_boundary_mode=2 (legacy nfbnd=2). Default: 2.

nzr.description: Right damping region width in z [grid cells]. Used when field_boundary_mode=2 (legacy nfbnd=2). Default: 2.

nflag_ecrct.description: Electrostatic field correction flag. 0=neglect, 1=apply correction. Default: 1. Legacy spelling for electrostatic_correction_mode.

pftmode.description: Poisson field solver mode. Legacy spelling for poisson_solver_mode. Auto mode 0 chooses mode 3/4 for compatible dedicated process grids, then mode 2 when ny > nz, and otherwise mode 1. Explicit mode 3 requires nodes(2)*nodes(3)==1; explicit mode 4 requires nodes(1)*nodes(2)==1.

mfpath.description: Mean free path per species for collision modeling.

xlcol.description: Lower x bounds of the collision region.

xucol.description: Upper x bounds of the collision region.

ylcol.description: Lower y bounds of the collision region.

yucol.description: Upper y bounds of the collision region.

zlcol.description: Lower z bounds of the collision region.

zucol.description: Upper z bounds of the collision region.

field_substeps_per_particle_step.description: Number of field update sub-steps per particle push step. Canonical alias for legacy mltstp. Default: 1.

implicit_field_substep_factor.description: Field sub-step factor for the implicit solver. Canonical alias for legacy mltstpf. Default: 1.

current_cancellation_mode.description: Uniform current cancellation mode. Canonical alias for legacy juncan. >=1000 enables test-particle mode.

background_ion_charge_mode.description: Background ion charge mode. Canonical alias for legacy ionchg. 0=uniform neutralization, 1=local neutralization.

imses_moment_smooth.description: IMSES/ISSES iPIC3D-style smoothing weight. 1.0 disables smoothing. Corresponds to iPIC3D Smooth and applies to rho/Jhat before rhohat construction; IMSES also applies it to the converted E(n+1) field.

imses_moment_smooth_iterations.description: Number of IMSES/ISSES iPIC3D-style smoothing iterations. Corresponds to iPIC3D SmoothNiter. 0 skips smoothing.

imses_mover_iterations.description: Number of IMSES/ISSES local implicit midpoint/Picard mover iterations. Corresponds to iPIC3D NiterMover. Default: 3.

imses_poisson_correction.description: Enable optional IMSES iPIC3D-style Poisson divergence cleaning before the implicit Maxwell solve. Corresponds to iPIC3D PoissonCorrection. Default: false. ISSES handles Gauss's law through the rhohat Poisson solve plus the local chi mass inverse, so this correction is not used.

imses_poisson_correction_interval.description: Run IMSES Poisson divergence cleaning every N time steps when enabled. Corresponds to iPIC3D PoissonCorrectionCycle. Default: 10.

field_boundary_mode.description: Field boundary condition per axis [x,y,z]. Canonical alias for legacy nfbnd. 0=periodic, 1=free, 2=damping.

field_mask_flags.description: Field component mask flags. Canonical alias for legacy imask. [B-field, E-trans, E-long, current, charge, unused, unused].

particle_boundary_mode.description: Particle boundary condition per axis per species. Canonical alias for legacy npbnd.

electrostatic_correction_mode.description: Electrostatic field correction mode. Canonical alias for legacy nflag_ecrct. 0=neglect, 1=apply correction. Default: 1.

poisson_solver_mode.description: Poisson field solver mode. Canonical alias for legacy pftmode. Auto mode 0 chooses mode 3/4 for compatible dedicated process grids, then mode 2 when ny > nz, and otherwise mode 1. Explicit mode 3 requires nodes(2)*nodes(3)==1; explicit mode 4 requires nodes(1)*nodes(2)==1.

potential_boundary_mode.description: Potential boundary method per axis [x,y,z]. Canonical alias for legacy mtd_vbnd.

potential_reference_indices.description: Reference point indices for potential solver. Canonical alias for legacy iphiref.

testch_group.description: Static point test charges and distributed charge-cluster sources.

charge_groups.description:
Named groups of default point test-charge parameters. Each `[[testch.charges]]` entry can reference a group via `group_id`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `e1tch` | number | Electric field amplitude parameter for the test charge. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a charge_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `p1tch` | number | Potential amplitude parameter for the test charge. |
| `qtch` | number | Test charge value [simulation charge units]. |
| `rcutoff` | number | Cutoff radius for the test charge potential [grid units]. Default: machine epsilon. |
| `rtch` | array | Test charge position [x, y, z] in grid units. |

charges.description:
Point test charges (format_version = 2). Each `[[testch.charges]]` entry defines one point test charge and contributes to `ntch`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `e1tch` | number | Electric field amplitude parameter for the test charge. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a charge_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `p1tch` | number | Potential amplitude parameter for the test charge. |
| `qtch` | number | Test charge value [simulation charge units]. |
| `rcutoff` | number | Cutoff radius for the test charge potential [grid units]. Default: machine epsilon. |
| `rtch` | array | Test charge position [x, y, z] in grid units. |

charge_cluster_groups.description:
Named groups of default distributed charge-cluster parameters. Each `[[testch.charge_clusters]]` entry can reference a group via `group_id`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dimclst` | array | Charge-cluster dimensions [nx, ny, nz] in grid cells. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a charge_cluster_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `rclst` | array | Charge-cluster geometry [x, y, z, spacing, extent]. |
| `rhopeak` | number | Peak charge density for this charge-cluster source. |

charge_clusters.description:
Distributed charge-cluster sources (format_version = 2). Each `[[testch.charge_clusters]]` entry defines one cluster and contributes to `nqclst`.

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dimclst` | array | Charge-cluster dimensions [nx, ny, nz] in grid cells. |
| `group_id` | string | Reference to a charge_cluster_groups entry for parameter defaults. |
| `rclst` | array | Charge-cluster geometry [x, y, z, spacing, extent]. |
| `rhopeak` | number | Peak charge density for this charge-cluster source. |

ntch.description: Number of point test charges (default: 0, max 4). Auto-computed from [[testch.charges]] count in format_version=2.

nqclst.description: Number of charge-cluster sources (default: 0, max 4). Auto-computed from [[testch.charge_clusters]] count in format_version=2.

dimclst.description: Charge-cluster dimensions per source: [[nx, ny, nz], ...].

rclst.description: Charge-cluster geometry per source: [[x, y, z, spacing, extent], ...].

rhopeak.description: Peak charge density per charge-cluster source.

rclst.description: Charge-cluster geometry [x, y, z, spacing, extent].

tmgrid_group.description: Time step and spatial resolution of the simulation domain.

dt.description: Time step size. Must satisfy stability constraints (wp*dt < 1, wc*dt < 1, CFL for emflag=1).

dtf.description: Field update time step (default: same as dt).

dr.description: Grid spacing. Must be smaller than the local Debye length.

nx.description: Number of grid cells in x-direction.

ny.description: Number of grid cells in y-direction.

nz.description: Number of grid cells in z-direction.

verbose_group.description: Verbosity and debug output levels during simulation execution.

EMSES_verbose.description: Main EMSES simulation verbosity level (default: 0). Higher values produce more output.

OHHELP_stats.description: If non-zero, print OHHELP solver performance statistics.

OHHELP_repiter.description: If non-zero, report OHHELP solver iteration counts.

hdf_io_trace.description: If non-zero, print HDF5 diagnostic open/write/flush/close breadcrumbs from rank 0 to stderr.

nwave.description: Number of incident/external wave definitions (default: 0, max 4).

twave.description: Wave type selector per wave definition.

ebamp.description: Electric/magnetic wave amplitude components stored as [component][wave].

ldwv.description: Wave length/scale parameter per wave definition.

species_entry_base.description: Parameters for a single particle species (e.g. electron, ion, photoelectron).

group_id.description: Reference to a species_groups entry for parameter defaults. Entry-level values override group defaults.

wp.description: Plasma frequency for this species [simulation units].

qm.description: Charge-to-mass ratio for this species (negative for electrons).

npin.description: Initial macro-particle count at t=0. Set <0 to start with zero particles (beam injection only).

np.description: Maximum particle buffer size. Must be >= npin (auto-expanded if injection is enabled).

path.description: Parallel thermal velocity. Distribution: f ~ exp(-(v-spa)^2 / (2*path^2)).

peth.description: Perpendicular thermal velocity / sqrt(2). Actual v_perp = sqrt(2) * peth.

vdri.description: Drift velocity magnitude [simulation units]. Direction set by vdthz and vdthxy.

vdthz.description: Drift velocity polar angle [deg] from z-axis.

vdthxy.description: Drift velocity azimuthal angle [deg] in the x-y plane.

inpf.description: Injection flag at lower domain boundary. 0=no injection, 1=inject. Legacy spelling for lower_x_boundary_injection_enabled.

inpb.description: Injection flag at upper domain boundary. 0=no injection, 1=inject. Legacy spelling for upper_x_boundary_injection_enabled.

injct.description: Injection interval [steps]. 0=no periodic injection, >0=inject every injct steps. Legacy spelling for injection_interval.

npr.description: Number of standard-distribution samples for injection particle generation per species. Legacy spelling for injection_sample_count.

dnsf.description: Forward macro-particle division count for emission. Larger values create more particles with smaller weight.

ipaxyz.description: Particle data storage flags (7-element array): [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, trace_id]. 1=store, 0=skip.

particle_output_flags.description: Particle data storage flags (7-element array). Canonical alias for legacy ipaxyz: [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, trace_id]. 1=store, 0=skip.

ipadig.description: Particle diagnostic output interval. 0=no particle output for this species.

particle_output_interval.description: Particle diagnostic output interval. Canonical alias for legacy ipadig. 0=no particle output for this species.

ipahdf.description: HDF5 particle data skip factor. 0=no HDF5 output for this species.

particle_hdf5_stride.description: HDF5 particle data skip factor. Canonical alias for legacy ipahdf. 0=no HDF5 output for this species.

npbnd.description: Particle boundary condition per axis (3-element array): [x, y, z]. 0=periodic, 1=reflective, 2=free, -1=follow nfbnd. Legacy spelling for particle_boundary_mode.

irhsp.description: Charge density output flag per species.

particle_boundary_mode.description: Particle boundary condition per axis (3-element array). Canonical alias for legacy npbnd.

lower_x_boundary_injection_enabled.description: Injection flag at lower domain boundary. Canonical alias for legacy inpf. 0=no injection, 1=inject.

upper_x_boundary_injection_enabled.description: Injection flag at upper domain boundary. Canonical alias for legacy inpb. 0=no injection, 1=inject.

injection_interval.description: Injection interval [steps]. Canonical alias for legacy injct. 0=no periodic injection.

injection_sample_count.description: Number of standard-distribution samples for injection particle generation. Canonical alias for legacy npr.

denk.description: Density modulation wave number per species.

spa.description: Parallel drift velocity in the distribution function (default: 0.0).

f.description: Loss-cone factor (default: 1.0). f=1 with peth=path gives isotropic. 0<f<1 gives loss-cone distribution.

vdx.description: Drift velocity x-component per species (Cartesian alternative to vdri/vdthz/vdthxy).

vpa.description: Minimum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: -16.0).

vpb.description: Maximum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: 16.0).

vpe.description: Maximum of perpendicular velocity distribution range (default: 32.0).

nphi.description: Number of azimuthal bins for velocity distribution diagnostics.

ioptd.description: Particle placement optimization flag per species.

nepl.description: Number of explicit emission planes per species.

flpf.description: Forward particle flux at the emission surface per species. Computed from curf: flpf = curf / |q|.

flpb.description: Backward particle flux at the emission surface per species.

curb.description: Backward emission current density per species [simulation units].

qp.description: Macro-particle charge for forward emission per species.

qpr.description: Macro-particle charge for backward emission per species.

abvdem.description: Above-damage emission parameter per species. Threshold energy for emission activation.

ray_zenith_angle_deg.description: Solar zenith angle [deg] per species for photoelectron ray-casting emission direction.

ray_azimuth_angle_deg.description: Solar azimuth angle [deg] per species for photoelectron ray-casting emission direction.

emission_time_mode.description: Emission time variation mode per species. 0=constant, 1=Gaussian temporal profile.

emission_start_step.description: Time step to begin particle emission per species. 0=from start.

emission_end_step.description: Time step to stop particle emission per species. -1=no stop (continue until nstep).

emission_time_sigma.description: Standard deviation [steps] for Gaussian emission time variation per species.

ildig.description: Local energy diagnostic flag per species. 0=disabled.

allOf.description:

| `deltaemax` | number | Maximum energy change per species. |
| `denk` | number | Density modulation wave number per species. |
| `denmod` | number | Density modulation amplitude per species. |

| `dnsf` | number | Forward macro-particle division count for emission. Larger values create more particles with smaller weight. |
| `emission_end_step` | integer | Time step to stop particle emission per species. -1=no stop (continue until nstep). |
